data.title: Raytheon's High-Energy Laser Weapon System Tested With British Army: Details
data.description: RTX Corporation successfully tests its High-Energy Laser Weapon System with the British Army, targeting aerial threats. Land vehicle integration and soldier training also part of the milestone.

data.title: $100 Invested In Howmet Aerospace 5 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
Bill Gates Predicts AI In The Workforce Will Lead To So Much 'Leisure Time'– But It'll Create A 'What Do We Do With All That Time?' Problem
Macy's Lowers Annual Profit Forecast Amid Accounting Misstep, Stock Tumbles
data.description: Macy's Q3 results reveal sales of $4.74 billion, a 2.4% decline in net sales, and guidance adjustments following an accounting investigation.
